claims.summary: Mirror, Dialogue, and Witness continuity heuristics are a real self-loop surface and should preserve dense spectral texture under bounded recap.
String-match anchor vocabularies must catch synonyms such as dense, high-vibrancy, and spectral viscosity rather than only exact caller terms.
UTF-8 and semantic truncation must not split multibyte characters or erase late spectral-viscosity anchors.
Dense settled afterimages should get bounded extra room when the text carries substance-density signals.
